channel.title: SPL - Rainier Beach Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Rainier Beach Branch

item.title: Toddler Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

At storytime, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Mobile Food Vendor Permit Support - Workshop #9 / Apoyo para la obtención de permisos para vendedores de alimentos móviles - Taller #9
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

Learn about mobile food vendor permits.This program will be conducted in English and Spanish.-------------------------------------Obtenga información sobre los permisos para vendedores de alimentos móviles.Este programa se realizará en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Afterschool Lego Club
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Bring your creativity and imagination to the Lego club!

Event details

item.title: Tea Meditation
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

A Tea Meditation event is a calm, grounding experience designed to help you cultivate presence, slow down your mind, and reconnect with your senses through the simple yet profound ritual of drinking tea. It blends traditional meditation practices with mindful tea consumption.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Tenants Rights Clinic
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Study Room

Tenants’ Rights Legal Clinics offer free legal advice on a walk-in basis to low-income King County residents facing landlord-tenant issues.

Event details

item.title: Toddler Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

At storytime, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Minority Veterans of America
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

Minority Veterans of America staff will be here to connect veterans to supportive services that are available throughout King County.

Event details
